nodes.label: Teams Webhook Configuration Pattern
nodes.rationale: Teams webhook URL, enable flag and default mail are stored as ir.config_parameter system parameters, allowing administrators to configure Microsoft Teams integration without code changes.

nodes.label: Contract Expiry Notification Pattern
nodes.rationale: contract_notify_check reads day thresholds (contract_notify_1/2/3) from ir.config_parameter, computes contracts expiring within those days, and delegates Teams notification to ServiceTeamsNotify. This decouples scheduling from delivery.
